/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/link.d  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -shared -Wl,-soname,libeckit_codec.so -o ../../../lib/libeckit_codec.so CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/Data.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/Exceptions.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/FileStream.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/Metadata.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/ReadRequest.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/Record.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/RecordItem.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/RecordItemReader.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/RecordPrinter.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/RecordReader.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/RecordWriter.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/Session.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/Stream.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/detail/Base64.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/detail/Checksum.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/detail/DataType.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/detail/Decoder.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/detail/demangle.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/detail/Encoder.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/detail/Link.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/detail/Time.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/print/Bytes.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/print/JSONFormat.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/print/TableFormat.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/types/array/ArrayMetadata.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/types/array/ArrayReference.cc.o CMakeFiles/eckit_codec.dir/types/scalar.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib" ../../../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
